## Fixes

- **Push-to-talk voice typing now works with a Parley (hosted) account.** Dictation was streaming to the speech provider with the wrong credential, so it silently produced no text — the waveform twitched once and froze. It now routes through Parley Cloud like meeting transcription does.
- **Transcription failures are no longer silent.** When a live meeting or a dictation loses its speech-to-text session — out of hosted credits, an expired session, a rejected API key, or a mid-session disconnect — you now get a clear, actionable message instead of a frozen screen with no transcript. This covers every provider (Soniox, Deepgram, AssemblyAI, OpenAI, Gemini) and distinguishes hosted-account problems from your-own-key problems.
